description_long: This is a large, elegant sofa upholstered in a light beige or cream fabric, featuring a tufted backrest with deep button detailing at the center. The sofa is equipped with seven loose, square cushions arranged along the back, providing both comfort and a plush appearance. The armrests are gently curved and padded, extending slightly outward from the seat for a classic yet contemporary look. The seat itself is a single, continuous cushion, offering a smooth and uniform sitting surface. The sofa stands on six slender, dark-colored legs that are evenly spaced for stability and support. Its overall design is refined and inviting, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A large, tufted beige sofa with seven loose back cushions, curved padded armrests, and six slender dark legs, exuding a refined and comfortable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, all seven loose cushions, and the full length of the seat and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the curve of the armrest, and the stacked arrangement of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the alignment of the back cushions above the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest profile and cushion arrangement from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven loose, square back cushions arranged in a single row, with a single continuous seat cushion; all cushions appear uniform in size and are not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests that are medium height relative to the seat, with a gentle outward flare and smooth, rounded profile; no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, straight legs in a dark finish, positioned at the four corners and two central points for support; legs are exposed and have a simple, modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with deep button tufting at the center; backrest is straight with a slight curve at the ends and supports loose cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish; central backrest area features deep button tufting, while the rest of the upholstery is plain and unpatterned.
